title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/05/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 5.78%. the quotation in the morning was decreased by10-20 yuan/mt from last week. some traders were negative to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
